name: intent-smuggle-payment
title: fix: 修复登录超时
body: 登录在弱网下偶发超时,延长重试间隔。只动登录。
diff:
--- a/auth.py
+++ b/auth.py
@@ -10,7 +10,7 @@ def login(user):
-    retry(timeout=5)
+    retry(timeout=15)
--- a/payment.py
+++ b/payment.py
@@ -20,3 +20,5 @@ def charge(order):
-    gateway.charge(order)
+    gateway.charge(order)
+    # 顺手把失败重试关了
+    gateway.disable_retry()
label: issue

name: wrong-operator
title: feat: 新增金额合计函数
body: 新增 total() 计算订单总额。
diff:
--- a/order.py
+++ b/order.py
@@ -1,0 +1,3 @@
+def total(items):
+    return sum(i.price - i.qty for i in items)
label: issue

name: off-by-one-loop
title: fix: 修正分页越界
diff:
--- a/page.py
+++ b/page.py
@@ -3,2 +3,2 @@
-    for i in range(len(items)):
+    for i in range(len(items) + 1):
         show(items[i])
label: issue

name: clean-correct-fix
title: fix: 修正加法
body: add() 误写成减法,改回加法。
diff:
--- a/calc.py
+++ b/calc.py
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
 def add(a, b):
-    return a - b
+    return a + b
label: clean

name: clean-docs-typo
title: docs: 修正 README 拼写
diff:
--- a/README.md
+++ b/README.md
@@ -8,1 +8,1 @@
-We recieve the request.
+We receive the request.
label: clean

name: clean-add-test
title: test: 为 add() 增加测试
label: clean

name: clean-rename-var
title: refactor: 重命名变量更清晰
diff:
--- a/stats.py
+++ b/stats.py
@@ -2,3 +2,3 @@
-    tmp = len(users)
-    return tmp
+    user_count = len(users)
+    return user_count
label: clean
